title: Review this uncommitted diff for bugs, security issues, and code quality. Be concise (max 10 lines).
summary_text: - High: [scheduler.py:504](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/scheduler.py#L504) only treats `"twitter.com/status/"` as a quote marker, but generated posts use full `https://twitter.com/<user>/status/...` URLs ([auto_generator.py:408](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/auto_generator.py#L408)). Those posts will miss the quote branch and may incorrectly go out with an image instead of as a quote tweet. - High: [scheduler.py:510](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/scheduler.py#L510) + [x_poster.py:69](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/x_poster.py#L69) can now fail URL-only quote posts: `extract_quote_tweet_id()` strips the status URL, then `post_tweet()` rejects the empty `clean_text` with `ValueError("Tweet text cannot be empty.")`. That is a behavioral regression from the old plain-URL path. - Medium: [x_poster.py:60](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/x_poster.py#L60) removes the matched URL with surrounding suffix via `\S*`, so trailing punctuation attached to the URL is dropped too. That can silently mutate copy in normal prose. - No obvious new secret-handling or auth issues in this diff.
